title: phyllanthus prainianus
intro: Phyllanthus prainianus, also known as P. viridis or green phyllanthus, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus prainianus include its ability to prevent liver damage, treat liver diseases, and improve overall liver function. In herbal preparations, it is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
